text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Um, Trainer? I wanted to celebrate Valentine's
Day with you, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Valentine's Day should be a fun day, but Super
Creek seems awfully down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I ask her if she forgot to bring her chocolates.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'd never forget something like that. I brought
the chocolates I made, but...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: That's not it...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Will you try one for me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I pop one into my mouth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The flavor of heavenly chocolate blossoms in my
mouth—a true Super Creek masterpiece.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Does it taste okay?
choice_data_list: I could die happy right now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: What?! Please don't!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't see any problems with the flavor, so why
does she seem so upset?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You see, I put my heart and soul into making
these chocolates. But when they were done, it hit
me...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: What kind of chocolates are these exactly?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There are all sorts of chocolates, right? You give
some out of romance, others out of friendship...
or even obligation.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But I can't tell which feelings I poured into these.
choice_data_list: Surely they're not... out of obligation?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely not! If I had to pick the most
appropriate kind, then I guess it'd be romance,
but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know how to answer, since that's not the
kind of relationship an Umamusume has with her
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, if I really had to put a label on my
chocolates, then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our relationship is hard to define, so maybe
describing them as "ambiguous" makes sense.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You're right, but the thought of them being
ambiguous is a little sad.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: How about "ambiguously special chocolates?"

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Thank goodness. I feel a little better now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It makes sense. We have a relationship where we
can't really pin down what's special about it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek smiles and watches me enjoy the
chocolates. There's a hint of something special in
them that makes them all the more delicious.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Romantic chocolates are ones that you can only
give to someone you like, right?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The word "like" doesn't even come close to
describing how I feel about you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You have been and always will be irreplaceable
to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what to call them, but reserving
them for an irreplaceable partner only seems a bit
heavy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After pondering for a while, I suggest that there's
no need to label them at all.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But that's just plain old chocolate then! Are you
sure?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, but maybe you're right. Maybe they don't
need a label...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Words can't really describe the relationship we
have.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's something that others don't understand, but
we do.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Heh... hehehe. We're silly for overthinking it.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm sure you must be hungry now after all
that thinking.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
They're the most unique chocolates in the world,
so go ahead and eat up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The chocolates taste like a genuine bond, with a
sweetness no regular couple could dream of
experiencing.
